infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: AgroGina needs camera access to capture harvest photos and document crop conditions.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: AgroGina needs location access to record harvest locations and track deliveries.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: AgroGina needs background location for delivery tracking and geofenced clock-in.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: AgroGina uses Face ID for secure and quick authentication.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: AgroGina needs microphone access for voice notes in the field.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow AgroGina to access your camera for harvest documentation.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow AgroGina to use your location for field tracking and geofencing.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow AgroGina to access your photos for documentation.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow AgroGina to use Face ID for quick login.
